title: Entry Denied
description: A mod which brings Papers, Please to Minecraft.
body:
# ENTRY DENIED!

This mod is currently in Beta, expect bugs and report them [here.](https://discord.gg/36RxX8PGHC)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42413b1ebcb45c7a30687e511b1fc3b7fbac3abe.png)

## What is Entry Denied?

Entry Denied is a mod for NeoForge 1.21.1 and NeoForge 1.21.4 which brings Lucas Pope's indie game; Papers, Please to Minecraft. Including 16 unique passports, 16 IDs, Access Permit, Work Pass and Vaccine Certificate. All of which have unique GUIs with different information sections which can be filled in using a Document Issuer. 

Each of the 16 passports (of every dye colour in Minecraft) have unique GUIs which can be all be customised and filled in with the Document Issuer.

Each passport can be stamped using the Passport stamp tool which can be configured using its GUI.

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf32881567d0d8e6d8ea8975d8928d8a2efbbec.png)

## Weight System

The mod also includes a custom weight system which assigns a random weight from 60kg to 110kg. Adding a reason for the 'Weight' section in IDs and Access permits, weights can be checked by linking a Iron Weight Scale and a Weight Gauge with a wrench, which is shown in the video below; 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zRtjP75oCm8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf32881567d0d8e6d8ea8975d8928d8a2efbbec.png)

## Other items added in the mod

Landmine - explodes when a entity steps on it
Barbed wire - hurts and slows entities when moving in it
Floppy Discs - 3 new music discs of villager covers of the Papers Please main theme, death theme and victory theme, only avalible in creative mode at the moment.
Siren - Has a GUI where you can select one of three sounds; 'Next' sound, 'Foghorn' sound and 'Alarm' sound and plays when triggered by redstone. 

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf32881567d0d8e6d8ea8975d8928d8a2efbbec.png)

## Q&A

Q: Will this be useful on singleplayer worlds?
A: Not really, I suppose barbed wire and landmines could help, however the mod is mainly for multiplayer servers.

Q: The weight system isnt working/I dont seem to have a weight?
A: Use the command /reweight to re-assaign yourself a weight, then report it in bug-reports [here.](https://discord.gg/36RxX8PGHC)

Q: Where can I report bugs?
A: [Here.](https://discord.gg/36RxX8PGHC)

![Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bf32881567d0d8e6d8ea8975d8928d8a2efbbec.png)

## Licensing and stuff

All textures and artwork for the mod, and the mod itself is made by me, IcyDragonTheNoob with All Rights Reserved. The sounds and inspiration came from Lucas Pope's Papers, Please.

You can use this mod on all servers, youtube videos commercial or not, you may distribute but not as your own. Creation of Addons are allowed and encouraged.
